name: Mark of Making Spells
summary: If your human character has the Mark of Passage, the following traits replace the human's Ability Score Increase trait found in the Player's Handbook

traits.name: Intuitive Motion
traits.summary: Whenever you make an Dexterity (Acrobatics) or an Ability Check involving operating or maintaining a Land Vehicle, you can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the total ability check.

traits.name: Magical Passage
traits.summary: You can cast theMisty Stepspell with this trait. Once you cast this spell with this trait, you can't cast that spell again until you finish a Long Rest. Dexterity is your Spellcasting Ability for these spells.

traits.name: Spells of the Mark
traits.summary: If you have the Spellcasting or Pact Magic class feature, the spells on the Mark of Passage Spells table are added to the spell list of your Spellcasting class.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Dexterity score increases by 2, and one other Ability Score of your choice increases by 1.
